name: ebo-api-bindings
documentation:
# EBO bindings

## Improvements

- No pydantic (just dataclasses)
- Better printing out of the box
- Better support for downloading files (optional progress bar via TQDM)
- Simpler calls

methods.name: ebo_api_bindings.client.File.sanitize_filename
documentation: Sanitize the filename by making it a valid filename on the current platform.

methods.name: ebo_api_bindings.client.File.extract_filename
documentation:
Extract the filename from the 'Content-Disposition' header if available,
or fallback to the URL basename.

methods.name: ebo_api_bindings.client.File.save
documentation:
Save the file to disk or writable object with optional progress tracking.

Args:
    path (str): Optional specific path or filename to save the file.
    dir (str): Optional directory to save the file. Ignored if 'path' is provided.
    writable: Optional writable object (e.g., an open file handle).
    chunk_size (int): Size of the chunks to read at once. Default is 8192 bytes.
    show_progress (bool): Whether to show a progress bar (default: False).

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.login
documentation: Get a JWT token to authenticate with the API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createUser
documentation: Create a new user and project

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createEvaluationUser
documentation: Creates an evaluation user and a new project, and redirects the user to the new project.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createProTierUser
documentation: Create a new user for the Professional Plan and a new project. Note that the Professional plan will not be enabled until the payment is successful.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createEnterpriseTrialUser
documentation: Creates an enterprise trial user and a new trial organization, and redirects the user to the new organization.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateCurrentUser
documentation: Update user properties such as name. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.convertCurrentUser
documentation: Convert current evaluation user account to regular account.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.activateCurrentUser
documentation: Activate the current user account (requires an activation code). This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.requestActivationCodeCurrentUser
documentation: Request a new activation code for the current user. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createDeveloperProfile
documentation: Create a developer profile for the current active user.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startEnterpriseTrial
documentation: Create an enterprise trial for the current user. Users can only go through a trial once.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.uploadPhotoCurrentUser
documentation: Upload a photo for the current user. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.changePasswordCurrentUser
documentation: Change the password for the current user account. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getUserByThirdPartyActivationCode
documentation: Get information about a user through an activation code. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.activateUserByThirdPartyActivationCode
documentation: Activate a user that was created by a third party. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.acceptTermsOfService
documentation: Accept Terms of Service.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.userDismissNotification
documentation: Dismiss a notification

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.userGenerateNewTotpMfaKey
documentation: Creates a new MFA key, only allowed if the user has no MFA configured. TOTP tokens use SHA-1 algorithm.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.userSetTotpMfaKey
documentation: Enable MFA on this account using an TOTP token. First create a new key via `userGenerateNewTotpMfaKey`.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.userDeleteTotpMfaKey
documentation: Disable MFA on this account using an TOTP token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.userUpgradeSubscription
documentation: Upgrade the current subscription.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.userCancelSubscription
documentation: Cancel the current subscription.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.userUndoCancelSubscription
documentation: Stop a pending cancellation. If you schedule a subscription to be canceled, and the subscription hasn't yet reached the end of the billing period, you can stop the cancellation. After a subscription has been canceled, you can't reactivate it.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateUser
documentation: Update user properties such as name. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.activateUser
documentation: Activate a user account (requires an activation code). This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.requestActivationCodeUser
documentation: Request a new activation code. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.uploadPhotoUser
documentation: Upload a photo for a user. This function is only available through a JWT token, and is not available for all users.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.changePasswordUser
documentation: Change the password for a user account. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setUserPassword
documentation: Set the password for a new SSO user. This function is only available through an SSO access token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.sendUserFeedback
documentation: Send feedback to Edge Impulse or get in touch with sales.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.sendUserUpgradeRequest
documentation: Send an upgrade to Enterprise request to Edge Impulse.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.requestResetPassword
documentation: Request a password reset link for a user.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.resetPassword
documentation: Reset the password for a user.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.verifyResetPassword
documentation: Verify whether the reset password code for the user is valid.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getUserNeedToSetPassword
documentation: Tells whether a user is registered and whether it needs to set its password.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getCurrentUser
documentation: Get information about the current user. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getCurrentUserProjects
documentation: Get projects for the current user. This returns all projects regardless of whitelabel. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listEmailsCurrentUser
documentation: Get a list of all emails sent by Edge Impulse to the current user. This function is only available through a JWT token, and is not available for all users.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listOrganizationsCurrentUser
documentation: List all organizations that the current user is a member of. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listOrganizationBucketsCurrentUser
documentation: List all organizational storage buckets that the current user has access to. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.userGetSubscriptionMetrics
documentation: Get billable compute metrics for a user. This function is only available to users with an active subscription.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getUser
documentation: Get information about a user. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listEmailsUser
documentation: Get a list of all emails sent by Edge Impulse to a user. This function is only available through a JWT token, and is not available for all users.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listOrganizationsUser
documentation: List all organizations for a user. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listOrganizationBucketsUser
documentation: List all organizational storage buckets that a user has access to. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listEnterpriseTrialsUser
documentation: Get a list of all enterprise trials for a user. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteCurrentUser
documentation: Delete a user. This function is only available through a JWT token, and can only remove the current user.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deletePhotoCurrentUser
documentation: Delete user profile photo. This function is only available through a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteUser
documentation: Delete a user. This function is only available through a JWT token, and can only remove the current user.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.shouldGoOnCanary
documentation: Get the decision to whether the requested URL goes on canary deployment or not

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAllThirdPartyAuth
documentation: Get information about all third party authentication partners

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getThirdPartyAuth
documentation: Get information about a third party authentication partner

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createThirdPartyAuth
documentation: Create a new third party authentication partner

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateThirdPartyAuth
documentation: Update a third party authentication partner

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.authorizeThirdParty
documentation: Authorize a third party to access a project

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createUserThirdParty
documentation: Login as a user as a third-party authentication provider. If the user does not exists, it's automatically created. You can only log in as users that were previously created by you.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteThirdPartyAuth
documentation: Delete a third party authentication partner

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getThemes
documentation: Get all available Studio themes.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getTheme
documentation: Get a theme given its unique identifier.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteTheme
documentation: Delete a theme given its unique identifier.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateThemeLogos
documentation: Update some or all theme logos.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateThemeColors
documentation: Update some or all theme colors.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateThemeFavicon
documentation: Update the theme favicon

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAllWhitelabels
documentation: Retrieve the list of registered white labels.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getWhitelabel
documentation: Retrieve all the information about this white label.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getWhitelabelDomain
documentation: Get a white label domain given its unique identifier.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAllImpulseBlocks
documentation: Lists all possible DSP and ML blocks available for this white label.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createWhitelabel
documentation: Create a new white label

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateDeploymentTargets
documentation: Update some or all of the deployment targets enabled for this white label.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateWhitelabel
documentation: Update the white label with the given id.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteWhitelabel
documentation: Deletes the white label with the given id.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listAllDeploymentTargets
documentation: List all deployment targets

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listDeploymentTargetsForProject
documentation: List deployment targets for a project

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listDeploymentTargetsForProjectDataSources
documentation: List deployment targets for a project from data sources page  (it shows some things like all Linux deploys, and hides 'fake' deploy targets like mobile phone / computer)

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getEvaluateJobResult
documentation: Get evaluate job result, containing detailed performance statistics for every possible variant of the impulse.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getEvaluateJobResultCache
documentation: Get evaluate job result, containing detailed performance statistics for every possible variant of the impulse. This only checks cache, and throws an error if there is no data in cache.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDeployment
documentation: Gives information on whether a deployment was already built for a type

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadBuild
documentation: Download the build artefacts for a project

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getLastDeploymentBuild
documentation: Get information on the result of the last successful deployment job, including info on the build e.g. whether it is still valid.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSyntiantPosterior
documentation: Get the current posterior parameters for the Syntiant deployment target

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setSyntiantPosterior
documentation: Set the current posterior parameters for the Syntiant deployment target

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.findSyntiantPosterior
documentation: Automatically find the current posterior parameters for the Syntiant deployment target

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listProjects
documentation: Retrieve list of active projects. If authenticating using JWT token this lists all the projects the user has access to, if authenticating using an API key, this only lists that project.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listDevkeys
documentation: Retrieve the development API and HMAC keys for a project. These keys are specifically marked to be used during development. These keys can be `undefined` if no development keys are set.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listDownloads
documentation: Retrieve the downloads for a project.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadCsvWizardConfig
documentation: Returns a JSON file with the current CSV wizard config. If there is no config this will throw a 5xx error.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getCsvWizardUploadedFileInfo
documentation: Returns whether the file that was uploaded when the CSV wizard was configured is available.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadCsvWizardUploadedFile
documentation: Returns the file that was uploaded when the CSV wizard was configured. If there is no config this will throw a 5xx error.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listProjectHmacKeys
documentation: Retrieve all HMAC keys.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listProjectApiKeys
documentation: Retrieve all API keys. This does **not** return the full API key, but only a portion (for security purposes). The development key will be returned in full, as it'll be set in devices and is thus not private.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listEmails
documentation: Get a list of all emails sent by Edge Impulse regarding this project.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSocketToken
documentation: Get a token to authenticate with the web socket interface.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getProjectDataAxesSummary
documentation: Get a list of axes that are present in the training data.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getProjectTrainingDataSummary
documentation: Get summary of all data present in the training set. This returns the number of data items, the total length of all data, and the labels. This is similar to `dataSummary` in `ProjectInfoResponse` but allows you to exclude disabled items or items that are still processing.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getProjectRecommendedDataInterval
documentation: Get the interval of the training data; if multiple intervals are present, the interval of the longest data item is returned.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listVersions
documentation: Get all versions for this project.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listPublicVersions
documentation: Get all public versions for this project. You don't need any authentication for this function.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getProjectLastModificationDate
documentation: Get the last modification date for a project (will be upped when data is modified, or when an impulse is trained)

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listDevelopmentBoards
documentation: List all development boards for a project

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getTargetConstraints
documentation: Retrieve target constraints for a project. The constraints object captures hardware attributes of your target device, along with an application budget to allow guidance on performance and resource usage

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getModelVariants
documentation: Get a list of model variants applicable to all trained learn blocks in this project.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSyntheticDataConfig
documentation: Get the last used synthetic data config

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listAIActions
documentation: Get all AI actions.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getNewAIAction
documentation: Get the AI Actions config for a new action

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAIAction
documentation: Get an AI Actions config

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.clearAIActionsProposedChanges
documentation: Remove all proposed changes for an AI Actions job.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listPublicProjects
documentation: Retrieve the list of all public projects. You don't need any authentication for this method.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listPublicProjectTypes
documentation: Retrieve the list of available public project types. You don't need any authentication for this method.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getProjectInfo
documentation: List all information about this project.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getProjectInfoSummary
documentation: List a summary about this project - available for public projects.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createProject
documentation: Create a new project. This API can only be called using a JWT token.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.uploadCsvWizardUploadedFile
documentation: Asynchronously called in the CSV Wizard to store the file that the CSV wizard was based on.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.addCollaborator
documentation: Add a collaborator to a project.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.removeCollaborator
documentation: Remove a collaborator to a project. Note that you cannot invoke this function if only a single collaborator is present.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.transferOwnership
documentation: Transfer ownership of a project to another user.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.transferOwnershipOrganization
documentation: Transfer ownership of a project to another organization.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.addProjectHmacKey
documentation: Add an HMAC key. If you set `developmentKey` to `true` this flag will be removed from the current development HMAC key.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.addProjectApiKey
documentation: Add an API key. If you set `developmentKey` to `true` this flag will be removed from the current development API key.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setProjectComputeTimeLimit
documentation: Change the job compute time limit for the project. This function is only available through a JWT token, and is not available to all users.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setProjectFileSizeLimit
documentation: Change the DSP file size limit for the project. This function is only available through a JWT token, and is not available to all users.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateVersion
documentation: Updates a version, this only updates fields that were set in the body.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.makeVersionPrivate
documentation: Make a public version private.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.uploadReadmeImage
documentation: Uploads an image to the user CDN and returns the path.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.launchGettingStartedWizard
documentation: This clears out *all data in your project*, and is irrevocable. This function is only available through a JWT token, and is not available to all users.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setTargetConstraints
documentation: Set target constraints for a project. Use the constraints object to capture hardware attributes of your target device, along with an application budget to allow guidance on performance and resource usage

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.projectDismissNotification
documentation: Dismiss a notification

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setAIActionsOrder
documentation: Change the order of AI actions. Post the new order of all AI Actions by ID. You need to specify _all_ AI Actions here. If not, an error will be thrown.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createAIAction
documentation: Create a new AI Action.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateAIAction
documentation: Store an AI Actions config. Use `createAIActionsJob` to run the job. Post the full AI Action here w/ all parameters.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.previewAIActionsSamples
documentation: Get a number of random samples to show in the AI Actions screen. If `saveConfig` is passed in, then a valid actionId is required in the URL. If you don't need to save the config (e.g. when creating a new action), you can use -1.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateProjectTags
documentation: Update the list of project tags.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateProject
documentation: Update project properties such as name and logo.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.revokeProjectHmacKey
documentation: Revoke an HMAC key. Note that if you revoke the development key some services (such as automatic provisioning of devices through the serial daemon) will no longer work.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.revokeProjectApiKey
documentation: Revoke an API key. Note that if you revoke the development API key some services (such as automatic provisioning of devices through the serial daemon) will no longer work.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteVersion
documentation: Delete a version. This does not delete the version from cold storage.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteAIAction
documentation: Deletes an AI Actions.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteProject
documentation: Remove the current project, and all data associated with it. This is irrevocable!

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listDevices
documentation: List all devices for this project. Devices get included here if they connect to the remote management API or if they have sent data to the ingestion API and had the `device_id` field set.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDevice
documentation: Retrieves a single device

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteDevice
documentation: Delete a device. When this device sends a new message to ingestion or connects to remote management the device will be recreated.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startSampling
documentation: Start sampling on a device. This function returns immediately. Updates are streamed through the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startDeviceInferenceDebugStream
documentation: Start an inference debug stream for this device with inference results (and images if a camera is attached). Updates are streamed through the websocket API. A keep-alive token is returned, you'll need to ping the API (with keepDeviceDebugStreamAlive) every 10 seconds (so we know when the client is disconnected).

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startDeviceSnapshotDebugStream
documentation: Start a snapshot debug stream for this device with a current camera view. Updates are streamed through the websocket API. A keep-alive token is returned, you'll need to ping the API (with keepDeviceDebugStreamAlive) every 10 seconds (so we know when the client is disconnected).

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.keepDeviceDebugStreamAlive
documentation: If you have opened a debug stream, ping this interface every 10 seconds to let us know to keep the debug stream open.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.stopDeviceDebugStream
documentation: If you have opened a debug stream, close it.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getImpulseRecords
documentation: Retrieve impulse records from the device.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createDevice
documentation: Create a new device. If you set `ifNotExists` to `false` and the device already exists, the `deviceType` will be overwritten.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.renameDevice
documentation: Set the current name for a device.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.requestDeviceModelUpdate
documentation: Trigger a model update request, this only works for devices connected to remote management server in inference mode.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listSamples
documentation: Retrieve all raw data by category.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.countSamples
documentation: Count all raw data by category.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getObjectDetectionLabelQueue
documentation: Get all unlabeled items from the object detection queue.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getObjectDetectionLabelQueueCount
documentation: Get count for unlabeled items from the object detection queue.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSampleMetadata
documentation: Get metadata for all samples in a project.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAllImportedFrom
documentation: Lists all data with an 'imported from' metadata key. Used to check in a data source which items are already in a project.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSample
documentation: Get a sample.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSampleAsRaw
documentation: Download a sample in it's original format as uploaded to the ingestion service.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSampleAsAudio
documentation: Get a sample as a WAV file. This only applies to samples with an audio axis.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSampleAsImage
documentation: Get a sample as an image file. This only applies to samples with RGBA data.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSampleAsVideo
documentation: Get a sample as an video file. This only applies to samples with video data.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSampleSlice
documentation: Get a slice of a sample.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getUncroppedDownsampledSample
documentation: Get the original, uncropped, downsampled data.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDataExplorerFeatures
documentation: t-SNE2 output of the raw dataset

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.hasDataExplorerFeatures
documentation: t-SNE2 output of the raw dataset

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDataExplorerPredictions
documentation: Predictions for every data explorer point (only available when using current impulse to populate data explorer)

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDataExplorerSettings
documentation: Get data explorer configuration, like the type of data, and the input / dsp block to use.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.hasDiversityData
documentation: Determine if data diversity metrics have been calculated. To calculate these metrics, use the `calculateDataQualityMetrics` endpoint.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDiversityData
documentation: Obtain metrics that describe the similarity and diversity of a dataset. To calculate these metrics, use the `calculateDataQualityMetrics` endpoint.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.hasLabelNoiseData
documentation: Determine if label noise metrics have been calculated. To calculate these metrics, use the `calculateDataQualityMetrics` endpoint.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getLabelNoiseData
documentation: Obtain metrics that describe potential label noise issues in the dataset. To calculate these metrics, use the `calculateDataQualityMetrics` endpoint.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAIActionsProposedChanges
documentation: Get proposed changes from an AI Actions job.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.rebalanceDataset
documentation: Rebalances the dataset over training / testing categories. This resets the category for all data and splits it 80%/20% between training and testing. This is a deterministic process based on the hash of the name of the data.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.clearAllObjectDetectionLabels
documentation: Clears all object detection labels for this dataset, and places all images back in the labeling queue.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteAllSamples
documentation: Deletes all samples for this project over all categories. This also invalidates all DSP and learn blocks. Note that this does not delete the data from cold storage.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteAllSamplesByCategory
documentation: Deletes all samples for this project over a single category. Note that this does not delete the data from cold storage.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.renameSample
documentation: Sets the file name of the sample. This name does not need to be unique, but it's highly recommended to do so.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.editLabel
documentation: Sets the label (also known as class) of the sample. Use the same label for similar types of data, as they are used during training.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.moveSample
documentation: Move a sample to another category (e.g. from test to training).

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.cropSample
documentation: Crop a sample to within a new range.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.splitSampleInFrames
documentation: Split a video sample into individual frames. Depending on the length of the video sample this will either execute immediately or return the ID of a job that will perform this action.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.findSegmentsInSample
documentation: Find start and end times for all non-noise events in a sample

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.segmentSample
documentation: Slice a sample into multiple segments. The original file will be marked as deleted, but you can crop any created segment to retrieve the original file.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setSampleBoundingBoxes
documentation: Set the bounding boxes for a sample

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setSampleStructuredLabels
documentation: Set structured labels for a sample. If a sample has structured labels the `label` column is ignored, and the sample is allowed to have multiple labels. An array of { startIndex, endIndex, label } needs to be passed in with labels for the complete sample (see `valuesCount` to get the upper bound). endIndex is _inclusive_. If you pass in an incorrect array (e.g. missing values) you'll get an error back.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.storeSegmentLength
documentation: When segmenting a sample into smaller segments, store the segment length to ensure uniform segment lengths.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.retryProcessing
documentation: If a sample failed processing, retry the processing operation.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.enableSample
documentation: Enable a sample, ensuring that it is not excluded from the dataset.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.disableSample
documentation: Disable a sample, ensuring that it is excluded from the dataset.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.classifyUsingAutolabel
documentation: Classify an image using another neural network.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setSampleMetadata
documentation: Adds or updates the metadata associated to a sample.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.moveToLabelingQueue
documentation: Clears the bounding box labels and moves item back to labeling queue

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setSampleProposedChanges
documentation: Queue up changes to an object as part of the AI Actions flow. This overwrites any previous proposed changes.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.batchEditLabels
documentation: Sets the label (also known as class) of multiple samples. Depending on the number of affected samples this will either execute immediately or return the ID of a job that will perform this action in batches.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.batchDelete
documentation: Deletes samples. Note that this does not delete the data from cold storage. Depending on the number of affected samples this will either execute immediately or return the ID of a job that will perform this action in batches.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.batchMove
documentation: Move multiple samples to another category (e.g. from test to training). Depending on the number of affected samples this will either execute immediately or return the ID of a job that will perform this action in batches.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.batchEnable
documentation: Enables samples, ensuring that they are not excluded from the dataset. Depending on the number of affected samples this will either execute immediately or return the ID of a job that will perform this action in batches.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.batchDisable
documentation: Disables samples, ensuring that they are excluded from the dataset. Depending on the number of affected samples this will either execute immediately or return the ID of a job that will perform this action in batches.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.batchAddMetadata
documentation: Add specific metadata for multiple samples.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.batchClearMetadataByKey
documentation: Clears a specific metadata field (by key) for multiple samples.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.batchClearMetadata
documentation: Clears all metadata for multiple samples.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.trackObjects
documentation: Track objects between two samples. Source sample should have bounding boxes set.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.clearDataExplorer
documentation: Remove the current data explorer state

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setDataExplorerSettings
documentation: Set data explorer configuration, like the type of data, and the input / dsp block to use.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.uploadDataExplorerScreenshot
documentation: Used internally (from a data pipeline) to upload a picture of the data explorer

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteSample
documentation: Deletes the sample. Note that this does not delete the data from cold storage.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getImpulse
documentation: Retrieve the impulse for this project. If you specify `impulseId` then that impulse is returned, otherwise the default impulse is returned.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getImpulseAll
documentation: Retrieve the impulse for this project including disabled blocks. If you specify `impulseId` then that impulse is returned, otherwise the default impulse is returned.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getImpulseBlocks
documentation: Lists all possible blocks that can be used in the impulse

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAllImpulses
documentation: Retrieve all impulse for a project

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAllDetailedImpulses
documentation: Retrieve all impulse for a project, including accuracy and performance metrics.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadDetailedImpulses
documentation: Download all impulse for a project, including accuracy and performance metrics, as JSON or CSV.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createImpulse
documentation: Sets the impulse for this project.  If you specify `impulseId` then that impulse is created/updated, otherwise the default impulse is created/updated.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createNewEmptyImpulse
documentation: Create a new empty impulse, and return the ID.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateImpulse
documentation: Update the impulse for this project.  If you specify `impulseId` then that impulse is created/updated, otherwise the default impulse is created/updated.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getNewBlockId
documentation: Returns an unused block ID. Use this function to determine new block IDs when you construct an impulse; so you won't accidentally re-use block IDs.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.verifyDspBlockUrl
documentation: Verify the validity of a custom DSP block

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setLegacyImpulseStateInternal
documentation: Set the complete impulse state for a project, writing impulses in the old (pre-impulse experiments) format. This completely clears out all files on FSx for this project. This is an internal API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.cloneImpulseStructure
documentation: Clones the complete structure (incl. config) of an impulse. Does not copy data.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.cloneImpulseComplete
documentation: Clones the complete impulse (incl. config and data) of an existing impulse.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deleteImpulse
documentation: Clears the impulse and all associated blocks for this project.  If you specify `impulseId` then that impulse is cleared, otherwise the default impulse is cleared.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDspConfig
documentation: Retrieve the configuration parameters for the DSP block. Use the impulse functions to retrieve all DSP blocks.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDspMetadata
documentation: Retrieve the metadata from a generated DSP block.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDspRawSample
documentation: Get raw sample data, but with only the axes selected by the DSP block. E.g. if you have selected only accX and accY as inputs for the DSP block, but the raw sample also contains accZ, accZ is filtered out. If you pass dspId = 0 this will return a raw graph without any processing.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDspSampleSlice
documentation: Get slice of raw sample data, but with only the axes selected by the DSP block. E.g. if you have selected only accX and accY as inputs for the DSP block, but the raw sample also contains accZ, accZ is filtered out.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.runDspSampleSliceReadOnly
documentation: Get slice of sample data, and run it through the DSP block. This only the axes selected by the DSP block. E.g. if you have selected only accX and accY as inputs for the DSP block, but the raw sample also contains accZ, accZ is filtered out.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDspFeatureLabels
documentation: Retrieve the names of the features the DSP block generates

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.dspSampleTrainedFeatures
documentation: Get a sample of trained features, this extracts a number of samples and their labels. Used to visualize the current training set.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.dspGetFeaturesForSample
documentation: Runs the DSP block against a sample. This will move the sliding window (dependent on the sliding window length and the sliding window increase parameters in the impulse) over the complete file, and run the DSP function for every window that is extracted.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDspFeatureImportance
documentation: Retrieve the feature importance for a DSP block (only available for blocks where dimensionalityReduction is not enabled)

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadDspData
documentation: Download output from a DSP block over all data in the training set, already sliced in windows. In Numpy binary format.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadDspLabels
documentation: Download labels for a DSP block over all data in the training set, already sliced in windows.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAutotunerResults
documentation: Get a set of parameters, found as a result of running the DSP autotuner.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadDspArtifact
documentation: Download an artifact from a DSP block for debugging. This is an internal API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getPerformanceAllVariants
documentation: Get estimated performance (latency and RAM) for the DSP block, for all supported project latency devices.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setDspConfig
documentation: Set configuration parameters for the DSP block. Only values set in the body will be overwritten.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.clearDspBlock
documentation: Clear generated features for a DSP block (used in tests).

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.runDspSampleSlice
documentation: Get slice of sample data, and run it through the DSP block. This only the axes selected by the DSP block. E.g. if you have selected only accX and accY as inputs for the DSP block, but the raw sample also contains accZ, accZ is filtered out.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startProfileCustomDspBlock
documentation: Returns performance characteristics for a custom DSP block (needs `hasTfliteImplementation`). Updates are streamed over the websocket API (or can be retrieved through the /stdout endpoint). Use getProfileTfliteJobResult to get the results when the job is completed.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.runDspOnFeaturesArray
documentation: Takes in a features array and runs it through the DSP block. This data should have the same frequency as set in the input block in your impulse.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getLearnXData
documentation: Download the processed data for this learning block. This is data already processed by the signal processing blocks.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getLearnYData
documentation: Download the labels for this learning block. This is data already processed by the signal processing blocks. Not all blocks support this function. If so, a GenericApiResponse is returned with an error message.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAnomaly
documentation: Get information about an anomaly block, such as its dependencies. Use the impulse blocks to find the learnId.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getAnomalyMetadata
documentation: Get metadata about a trained anomaly block. Use the impulse blocks to find the learnId.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getGmmMetadata
documentation: Get raw model metadata of the Gaussian mixture model (GMM) for a trained anomaly block. Use the impulse blocks to find the learnId.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getKeras
documentation: Get information about a Keras block, such as its dependencies. Use the impulse blocks to find the learnId.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getKerasMetadata
documentation: Get metadata about a trained Keras block. Use the impulse blocks to find the learnId.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getKerasDataExplorerFeatures
documentation: t-SNE2 output of the raw dataset using embeddings from this Keras block

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadKerasExport
documentation: Download an exported Keras block - needs to be exported via 'exportKerasBlock' first

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadKerasData
documentation: Download the data of an exported Keras block - needs to be exported via 'exportKerasBlockData' first

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadLearnModel
documentation: Download a trained model for a learning block. Depending on the block this can be a TensorFlow model, or the cluster centroids.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.anomalyTrainedFeatures
documentation: Get a sample of trained features, this extracts a number of samples and their features.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.anomalyTrainedFeaturesPerSample
documentation: Get trained features for a single sample. This runs both the DSP prerequisites and the anomaly classifier.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getPretrainedModelInfo
documentation: Receive info back about the earlier uploaded pretrained model (via `uploadPretrainedModel`) input/output tensors. If you want to deploy a pretrained model from the API, see `startDeployPretrainedModelJob`.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.downloadPretrainedModel
documentation: Download a pretrained model file

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setAnomaly
documentation: Configure the anomaly block, such as its minimum confidence score. Use the impulse blocks to find the learnId.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setKeras
documentation: Configure the Keras block, such as its minimum confidence score. Use the impulse blocks to find the learnId.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.uploadKerasFiles
documentation: Replace Keras block files with the contents of a zip. This is an internal API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.addKerasFiles
documentation: Add Keras block files with the contents of a zip. This is an internal API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.uploadPretrainedModel
documentation: Upload a pretrained model and receive info back about the input/output tensors. If you want to deploy a pretrained model from the API, see `startDeployPretrainedModelJob`.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.savePretrainedModelParameters
documentation: Save input / model configuration for a pretrained model. This overrides the current impulse. If you want to deploy a pretrained model from the API, see `startDeployPretrainedModelJob`.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.testPretrainedModel
documentation: Test out a pretrained model (using raw features) - upload first via  `uploadPretrainedModel`. If you want to deploy a pretrained model from the API, see `startDeployPretrainedModelJob`.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.profilePretrainedModel
documentation: Returns the latency, RAM and ROM used for the pretrained model - upload first via  `uploadPretrainedModel`. This is using the project's selected latency device. Updates are streamed over the websocket API (or can be retrieved through the /stdout endpoint). Use getProfileTfliteJobResult to get the results when the job is completed.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.classifySample
documentation: This API is deprecated, use classifySampleV2 instead (`/v1/api/{projectId}/classify/v2/{sampleId}`). Classify a complete file against the current impulse. This will move the sliding window (dependent on the sliding window length and the sliding window increase parameters in the impulse) over the complete file, and classify for every window that is extracted.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getSampleWindowFromCache
documentation: Get raw sample features for a particular window. This is only available after a live classification job has completed and raw features have been cached.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getClassifyJobResult
documentation: Get classify job result, containing the result for the complete testing dataset.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getClassifyJobResultPage
documentation: Get classify job result, containing the predictions for a given page.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getClassifyMetricsAllVariants
documentation: Get metrics, calculated during a classify all job, for all available model variants. This is experimental and may change in the future.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.classifySampleByLearnBlock
documentation: This API is deprecated, use classifySampleByLearnBlockV2 (`/v1/api/{projectId}/classify/anomaly-gmm/v2/{blockId}/{sampleId}`) instead. Classify a complete file against the specified learn block. This will move the sliding window (dependent on the sliding window length and the sliding window increase parameters in the impulse) over the complete file, and classify for every window that is extracted.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.classifySampleV2
documentation: Classify a complete file against the current impulse. This will move the sliding window (dependent on the sliding window length and the sliding window increase parameters in the impulse) over the complete file, and classify for every window that is extracted. Depending on the size of your file, whether your sample is resampled, and whether the result is cached you'll get either the result or a job back. If you receive a job, then wait for the completion of the job, and then call this function again to receive the results. The unoptimized (float32) model is used by default, and classification with an optimized (int8) model can be slower.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.classifySampleForVariants
documentation: Classify a complete file against the current impulse, for all given variants. Depending on the size of your file and whether the sample is resampled, you may get a job ID in the response.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.classifySampleByLearnBlockV2
documentation: Classify a complete file against the specified learn block. This will move the sliding window (dependent on the sliding window length and the sliding window increase parameters in the impulse) over the complete file, and classify for every window that is extracted. Depending on the size of your file, whether your sample is resampled, and whether the result is cached you'll get either the result or a job back. If you receive a job, then wait for the completion of the job, and then call this function again to receive the results. The unoptimized (float32) model is used by default, and classification with an optimized (int8) model can be slower.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.classifyImage
documentation: Test out a trained impulse (using a posted image).

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getPerformanceCalibrationStatus
documentation: Get performance calibration status

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getPerformanceCalibrationGroundTruth
documentation: Get performance calibration ground truth data

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getPerformanceCalibrationRawResult
documentation: Get performance calibration raw result

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getPerformanceCalibrationParameterSets
documentation: Get performance calibration parameter sets

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getPerformanceCalibrationSavedParameters
documentation: Get performance calibration stored parameters

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getWavFile
documentation: Get the synthetic sample as a WAV file

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getPostProcessingResults
documentation: Get results of most recent post processing run

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setPerformanceCalibrationSavedParameters
documentation: Set the current performance calibration parameters

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.uploadLabeledAudio
documentation: Upload a zip files with a wav file and its Label metadata to run performance calibration on it.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.clearPerformanceCalibrationState
documentation: Deletes all state related to performance calibration (used in tests for example).

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.deletePerformanceCalibrationSavedParameters
documentation: Clears the current performance calibration parameters

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startPostProcessingJob
documentation: Begins post processing job

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.generateDataExplorerFeatures
documentation: Generate features for the data explorer

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.calculateDataQualityMetrics
documentation: Calculate data quality metrics for the dataset

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.retryImpulseMigration
documentation: If an impulse migration previously failed, use this function to retry the job.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createSyntheticDataJob
documentation: Generate new synthetic data

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createPreviewAIActionsJob
documentation: Do a dry-run of an AI Actions job over a subset of data. This will instruct the block to propose changes to data items (via "setSampleProposedChanges") rather than apply the changes directly.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.createAIActionsJob
documentation: Run an AI Actions job over a subset of data. This will instruct the block to apply the changes directly to your dataset. To preview, use "createPreviewAIActionsJob". To set the config use `updateAIAction`.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.optimizeJob
documentation: Evaluates optimal model architecture

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.setTunerPrimaryJob
documentation: Sets EON tuner primary model

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateJob
documentation: Update a job.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.cancelJob
documentation: Cancel a running job.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.generateFeaturesJob
documentation: Take the raw training set and generate features from them. Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.autotuneDspJob
documentation: Autotune DSP block parameters. Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.trainKerasJob
documentation: Take the output from a DSP block and train a neural network using Keras. Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.trainAnomalyJob
documentation: Take the output from a DSP block and train an anomaly detection model using K-means or GMM. Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.exportKerasBlock

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.exportKerasBlockData
documentation: Export the data of a Keras block (already split in train/validate data). Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.buildOnDeviceModelJob
documentation: Generate code to run the impulse on an embedded device. When this step is complete use `downloadBuild` to download the artefacts.  Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.buildOrganizationOnDeviceModelJob
documentation: Generate code to run the impulse on an embedded device using an organizational deployment block. When this step is complete use `downloadBuild` to download the artefacts.  Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startOriginalExportJob
documentation: Export all the data in the project as it was uploaded to Edge Impulse.  Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startWavExportJob
documentation: Export all the data in the project in WAV format.  Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startRetrainJob
documentation: Retrains the current impulse with the last known parameters. Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startClassifyJob
documentation: Classifies all items in the testing dataset against the current impulse. Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startPerformanceCalibrationJob
documentation: Simulates real world usage and returns performance metrics.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startEvaluateJob
documentation: Evaluates every variant of the current impulse. Updates are streamed over the websocket API.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startVersionJob
documentation: Create a new version of the project. This stores all data and configuration offsite. If you have access to the enterprise version of Edge Impulse you can store your data in your own storage buckets (only through JWT token authentication).

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startRestoreJob

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startRestoreJobFromPublic

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startMakeVersionPublicJob

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startKeywordsNoiseJob

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startProfileTfliteJob

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.startDeployPretrainedModelJob

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getProfileTfliteJobResultViaPostRequest

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listFinishedJobs

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.listAllJobs

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getImpulseMigrationJobsLogs
documentation: Get the logs for the multi-impulse migration job in this project. This is a separate route so public projects can access it. If no multi-impulse migration jobs are present, an error will be thrown.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getJobStatus

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getJobsLogs

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getProfileTfliteJobResult

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getDspParameters

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getTransferLearningModels

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.getTrialLogs

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.endTrial

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.verifyOrganizationBucket
documentation: Verify connectivity to a storage bucket and optionally list its contents. This endpoint allows you to: 1. Check if the provided bucket credentials are valid and the bucket is accessible. 2. Optionally list files in the bucket up to a specified limit. 3. Validate the bucket configuration before adding it to the organization.  The request can include details such as the bucket name, region, credentials, and listing options. The response provides information about the bucket's accessibility and, if requested, a list of files in the bucket.  Important note on verification process: - For S3-compatible storage backends: Verification is expected to be immediate. - For Azure buckets: Verification takes longer. Users are required to poll this endpoint until the connectionStatus changes from 'connecting' to 'connected'.  When dealing with Azure buckets, implement a polling mechanism to check the status periodically until it's confirmed as connected.

functions.name: ebo_api_bindings.calls.updateOrganizationBucket
documentation: Updates storage bucket details. This only updates fields that were set in the request body. Before updating the bucket details, it is required to verify the connection using the POST /api/organizations/{organizationId}/buckets/verify endpoint.  The verification process: 1. Call the verify endpoint with the new bucket details. 2. Poll the verify endpoint until it responds with `connectionStatus: connected`. 3. If the endpoint responds with `connectionStatus: error`, the verification has failed.  Only proceed with updating the bucket details after receiving a `connected` status. The polling interval and timeout should be determined based on your application's requirements.

Versions can be private (just for internal use and reference) or public, available to everyone. A public version can be cloned by anyone, restoring the state of the project at the time into a new, separate project.

class_variables.name: ebo_api_bindings.models.SetSampleProposedChangesRequest.jobId
documentation: Job ID of an AI Actions job. This is passed into your job via the --propose-actions argument.

class_variables.name: ebo_api_bindings.models.CreatePreviewAIActionsJobRequest.cacheUnchangedSteps
documentation: If enabled, will load cached results from the previous preview job for unchanged jobs. Disable this if you're developing your own custom AI Labeling job, and want to always re-run all steps.

class_variables.name: ebo_api_bindings.models.UpdateAIActionRequest.dataCategory
documentation: Type of data to run this AI action on.

class_variables.name: ebo_api_bindings.models.UpdateAIActionRequest.setMetadataAfterRunning
documentation: After the action runs, add this key/value pair as metadata on the affected samples.

class_variables.name: ebo_api_bindings.models.UpdateAIActionRequest.name
documentation: User-provided name. If no name is set then displayName on the action will be automatically configured based on the transformation block.

class_variables.name: ebo_api_bindings.models.UpdateAIActionRequest.dataMetadataKey
documentation: Metadata key to filter on. Required if dataCategory is equal to "dataWithoutMetadataKey" or "dataWithMetadata".

class_variables.name: ebo_api_bindings.models.UpdateAIActionRequest.dataMetadataValue
documentation: Metadata value to filter on. Required if dataCategory is equal to "dataWithMetadata".

class_variables.name: ebo_api_bindings.models.UpdateAIActionRequest.sortOrder
documentation: Numeric value (1..n) where this action should be shown in the action list (and in which order the actions should run when started from a data source).

class_variables.name: ebo_api_bindings.models.AddApiKeyResponse.id
documentation: ID of the new API key

class_variables.name: ebo_api_bindings.models.AddApiKeyResponse.apiKey
documentation: New API Key (starts with "ei_...") - this'll be shared only once.
